entities.name: BREAD WHEAT
entities.description: The primary crop species being evaluated for quality and yield traits

entities.description: General characteristics determining the quality of the wheat grain

entities.name: PHENOLOGY
entities.description: The timing of biological growth stages in the wheat crop

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The overall productivity of the crop

entities.name: TEST WEIGHT
entities.description: A measure of grain density and size

entities.name: GRAIN PROTEIN CONTENT
entities.description: The percentage of protein present in the wheat grain

entities.name: SEDIMENTATION VALUE
entities.description: A measure of the protein quality and strength of the wheat flour

entities.name: DAYS TO SPIKE EMERGENCE
entities.description: The number of days from sowing to the emergence of the wheat spike

entities.name: DAYS TO MATURITY
entities.description: The number of days from sowing to the physiological maturity of the crop

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The weight of grain produced per unit area

entities.name: THOUSAND-GRAIN WEIGHT
entities.description: The weight of one thousand individual grains

entities.name: MULTI-ENVIRONMENT ANALYSIS
entities.description: The process of evaluating germplasm across different locations and environments to assess stability and performance

entities.name: BEST LINEAR UNBIASED ESTIMATES
entities.description: A statistical method used to estimate the genetic value of traits

entities.name: CORE COLLECTION
entities.description: A representative subset of a larger genebank collection used for diversity analysis

entities.name: DONOR GERMPLASM
entities.description: Genetic material containing desirable traits to be introduced into breeding lines

entities.name: NUTRITIONAL SECURITY
entities.description: The state of having reliable access to a sufficient quantity of affordable, nutritious food

entities.description: The state of having reliable access to a sufficient quantity of affordable, nutritious food

entities.name: BIOFORTIFIED CULTIVARS
entities.description: Crop varieties bred to increase their nutritional value

entities.description: A health condition resulting from a deficiency of protein in the diet
